items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Separation of duties (maker/checker)', but there is no evidence provided that directly supports the execution or outcome of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific checks or validations for this persona scenario, leading to an inconclusive result regarding its fulfillment.
